idea-plugin.name: Guttenbergovitz UI Theme
idea-plugin.description:
Guttenbergovitz UI Theme

A warm, vintage-inspired UI theme for JetBrains IDEs, designed to complement the Guttenbergovitz editor color scheme.


Features:

  • Complete UI theming for all JetBrains IDEs
  • Support for New UI (2023.3+)
  • Warm, low blue-light color palette
  • Consistent with Guttenbergovitz editor scheme
  • Optimized for reduced eye strain

Color Philosophy:

  • Less blue light, more warmth
  • Minimal but meaningful highlighting
  • Focus on readability
  • Inspired by vintage book printing and jazz aesthetics

Install the matching Guttenbergovitz editor color scheme for the complete experience.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Complete UI theme for all JetBrains IDEs
  • Full support for New UI (2023.3+)
  • Comprehensive theming for all UI components
  • Consistent color palette aligned with palette.json
  • Support for tool windows, tabs, menus, popups, and more
  • Welcome screen theming
  • SearchEverywhere theming
  • Notification theming
  • Version control UI theming
